with:
  # Helper function to normalize nationality
      def normalize_nationality(nationality_str):
          # Convert plural nationalities to singular (e.g., "Americans" -> "American")
          if nationality_str.endswith("s") and len(nationality_str) > 2:
              return nationality_str[:-1]
          return nationality_str
  
      # Build the main sentence starting with the primary subject
      primary_triples = subject_triples.get(primary_subject, [])
  
      # Collect all information about the primary subject
      main_clauses = []
      creator_list = []
      other_info = []
  
      for t in primary_triples:
          if t.predicate == "creator":
              creator_list.append(t.object)
          elif t.predicate == "fullName":
              main_clauses.append(f"whose full name is {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "alternativeName":
              main_clauses.append(f"also known as {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "series":
              main_clauses.append(f"part of the series {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "firstAppearanceInFilm":
              main_clauses.append(f"first appearing in the film {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "voice":
              main_clauses.append(f"voiced by {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "nationality":
              nat = normalize_nationality(t.object)
